title: Exact positive finite count
statement: Every generated nonempty finite succession of structural-One occurrences has one exact positive count representation: its complete generation trace, retaining every generated occurrence once and adding none.

candidate_grammar.generator: For no retained occurrence, generate the two ungenerated-extra classes. For proper or complete retained coverage, generate the product of exact-once or duplicated multiplicity with absence or presence of ungenerated extra occurrences.
candidate_grammar.boundary: All representations of any registered nonempty finite generation trace, classified by coverage of its generated occurrences, multiplicity of retained occurrences, and addition of occurrences outside that trace.

excluded_inputs: V2 count definitions, implementations or answer artifacts
negative, irrational, imaginary or floating proof quantities
completed infinity or an ungenerated continuum
intended_certificate: Independent regeneration of the complete coverage, multiplicity and extra-occurrence grammar and its unique survivor.
